title: Henwenskeepers pvp pack
description: Henwenskeeper's pvp pack the best pack for modern pvp
body: This pack gives you fresh ways to play and enjoy every moment, adding full voice chat, high-detail 3D mace textures, and plenty of new mechanics and tweaks. Sodium is installed to improve frame rates and visuals, so combat, exploration, and social moments feel smoother, more responsive, and entirely more enjoyable.
